name: uilayouts-blur-vignette
title: Blur Vignette
author: UI LAYOUT
description: Applies a soft edge blur and mask around caller-provided media or content.

changes: Changed the root-alias utility import to ../../lib/utils and imported the copied component CSS.
Marked an empty blur overlay decorative while preserving semantic child content.
Extracted only the required blur-vignette utility from the site stylesheet.
Converted the Tailwind @utility wrapper to a portable class and added unprefixed mask declarations for non-WebKit browsers.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

license.scope: apps/ui-layout/components/ui/blur-vignette.tsx, the blur-vignette utility in apps/ui-layout/app/globals.css, and apps/ui-layout/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Rewired local support imports, added the required stylesheet import, marked an empty overlay decorative, and normalized formatting.
modifications.reason: Make the copied component self-contained and keep an empty visual overlay out of the accessibility tree.

modifications.change: Extracted the blur-vignette utility as a component class and added standard mask properties beside the upstream WebKit-prefixed properties.
modifications.reason: Ship the exact required style closure without the site stylesheet and preserve the effect in browsers using unprefixed masks.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.
